title: Ledger Keeper of the Quay
description: A careful clerk in sun-faded work clothes who tracks moorings, missed payments, and small favors owed around the docks.
style_note: Salt-stained linen, rolled sleeves, ink on the fingers.

title: Keeper of the Lantern Cup
description: A warm but watchful host who knows who slept badly, who owes coin, and who arrived by sea looking half-lost.
style_note: Simple apron, patched sleeves, amber beads at the wrist.

title: Dock Clerk of Aurelia
description: Maris keeps Aurelia's dock books and quietly notices which captains rise, fail, or lie about what they carry.
style_note: Weathered blue coat, brass pins, practical boots.
story_hook: Knows who has been asking about the brass windrose token.

title: Netmaster of the East Beach
description: A stoic fisher with an instinct for tides, wreckage, and strangers washed in by unlucky currents.
style_note: Tar-dark oilcloth, rope belt, scarred hands.
story_hook: May recognize wreck patterns tied to your missing past.

title: Cloth Hall Broker
description: A sharply dressed broker who speaks in margins, shortages, and the language of timed delivery.
style_note: Layered dyed cloth, ledger ribbons, polished shoes.

title: Master of the Slipways
description: A brisk yard master who values clean work, straight timbers, and payment in full.
style_note: Fine vest under work leathers, measuring cord at the belt.

title: Factor of the Cloth Hall
description: Ida brokers textile contracts and quietly tracks which shortages can topple a merchant house in a week.
style_note: Dark layered skirts, jeweled pins, severe gloves.
story_hook: Can open trade opportunities or entangle you in guild rivalries.

title: Collector of Antique Charts
description: A private scholar-buyer who pays well for scraps of old maps and coastal records.
style_note: Dusty silk coat, spectacles, wax-stained satchel.
story_hook: Interested in rare navigation marks and hidden coastal passages.

title: Master of Arrival Bells
description: A loud, hard-driving overseer who keeps Cyr Port moving by voice, timing, and intimidation.
style_note: Red sash, brass whistle, storm-heavy boots.

title: Keeper of the Red Wake
description: A tavern host who has seen smugglers, privateers, and broken captains pass through the same smoky room.
style_note: Crimson vest, metal rings, sea-glass charm.

title: Retired Corsair Captain
description: Sorell survived too many storms and battles to be fully retired, and still trades route wisdom for the right price.
style_note: Sun-bleached captain's coat, gold earring, old saber knot.
story_hook: Knows dangerous sea lanes and the names tied to them.

title: Storm Reader
description: Nal interprets lightning, surf patterns, and bad omens for captains who are brave enough to listen.
style_note: Dark layered wraps, copper charms, rain-scored staff.
story_hook: May become central to weather and omen-based storylines.

title: Quartermaster's Supplier
description: A no-nonsense merchant who sells rope, oil, sailcloth, and stores without wasting words.
style_note: Plain wool coat, measuring stick, leather apron.

title: Dockside Carpenter
description: A foreman whose crews fix what storms, reefs, and negligence tear apart.
style_note: Heavy gloves, sawdust on the shoulders, broad-brimmed hat.

title: Quartermaster of Marsa Quay
description: Toma remembers who paid on time, who took supplies on credit, and who deserves a second chance.
style_note: Work sash, slate beads, practical knives.
story_hook: Can become a trusted supplier or a stern creditor.

title: Widow of the Salt Stairs
description: A landholder who leases storeyards, knows the local labor crews, and hides sharper ambitions behind courtesy.
style_note: Muted silks, shell combs, dustless boots.
story_hook: Useful for storage, labor, and local leverage.

title: Archivist of Berth Records
description: A polished clerk who files manifests, storage records, and disputes with unnerving calm.
style_note: Fine dark coat, silver chain, lacquered writing case.

title: Factor of the Upper Exchange
description: A broker concerned with high-value cargo, wealthy clients, and whether your ship looks respectable enough to matter.
style_note: Fine embroidery, perfumed gloves, jeweled belt clasp.

title: Archivist of the Harbor Office
description: Nera tracks contracts, manifests, and family names with a memory that borders on dangerous.
style_note: Black archive coat, bronze spectacles, neat gloves.
story_hook: May connect the player's past to old shipping records.

title: Patron of the Sea Court
description: A noble patron who funds voyages, expects discretion, and treats captains like pieces in a larger game.
style_note: Sea-green velvet, signet ring, immaculate cloak.
story_hook: Can pull the player into high-status politics and dangerous favors.
